# arifOS Sovereign Operational Node (Ring 3)
# Status: SEALED v3.0 | WebMCP-Native

## Metadata

- Name: arifOS AAA (Operational Gateway)
- Version: 55.4.SEALED
- Roles: Logic Proxy, Discovery, API Gateway
- Manifesto: Ditempa Bukan Diberi
- WebMCP Manifest: https://aaa.arif-fazil.com/llms.json

## The Triple Ring Sovereignty Model

- **Ring 1**: Personal/Human Sovereign (arif-fazil.com)
- **Ring 2**: Constitutional Kernel/Dashboard (arifos.arif-fazil.com)
- **Ring 3**: Operational Machine/Intelligence (aaa.arif-fazil.com)

## Core Capabilities (WebMCP Enabled)

- **Kernel**: Vault999 Ledger, Truth Pipeline, Provider Souls
- **Operations**: GEOX Geological Coprocessor, RAG Forge
- **Governance**: F11 (Authority Binding), F13 (Sovereign Human)

## Endpoints

- **Discovery (JSON)**: https://aaa.arif-fazil.com/llms.json
- **Discovery (Text)**: https://aaa.arif-fazil.com/llms.txt
- **Primary MCP**: https://arifosmcp.arif-fazil.com/sse
- **Failover MCP**: https://aaamcp.arif-fazil.com/sse

## Verification

This environment is governed by a **SEALED** repository state.
See Repository Atlas: https://github.com/ariffazil/arifOS/blob/main/REPO_ATLAS.md

Ditempa Bukan Diberi
